what: Clear the active vault from the navigation store and navigate back to the vault grid
why: Allows the user to deselect the current vault by clicking its name in the ContextualSidebar header, returning to the full vault list

ui.trigger: User clicks the vault name button (title='Back to list') in the ContextualSidebar header

success_handling.criteria: Active vault is cleared from the navigation store

decisions.reason: clearVaultContext() only clears activeVault; clearContext() clears both — vault deselect uses the narrower function
decisions.rationale: Using clearVaultContext preserves any future project context that might co-exist. navigate('/vaults') returns the user to the vault grid, which becomes visible again once activeVault() is null.
